entries.title: Kernel
entries.description: The core of macOS itself. It also deliberately uses CPU to keep the Mac cool — so high CPU here often means the system is managing heat, not a problem you can fix by quitting it.

entries.title: launchd (system launcher)
entries.description: The first process macOS starts (PID 1). It launches and supervises every other service and app. Essential — never quit it.

entries.title: Window Server
entries.description: Draws and composites everything you see on screen. Higher CPU/RAM is normal with many windows, multiple or high-resolution displays, and animations.

entries.title: mDNS / Bonjour networking
entries.description: Handles DNS lookups and Bonjour discovery (printers, AirPlay, file sharing). Always running and essential to networking.

entries.title: Spotlight — metadata server
entries.description: The heart of Spotlight search. Coordinates indexing of files so search is instant.

entries.title: Spotlight — index store
entries.description: Builds and stores the Spotlight search index. Can use heavy CPU/disk for a while after a big file change, an update, or a new drive — this settles on its own.

entries.title: Spotlight — indexing worker
entries.description: A short-lived helper that reads files so Spotlight can index them. Many may appear briefly during indexing; this is normal.

entries.title: Spotlight — indexing worker
entries.description: A short-lived helper that reads files for Spotlight indexing. Spikes during indexing are normal.

entries.title: Core Audio daemon
entries.description: Manages all audio input and output. Active whenever sound is playing or recording.

entries.title: Preferences daemon
entries.description: Reads and writes app and system preferences (settings). Runs constantly in the background.

entries.title: Notification distribution
entries.description: Delivers internal notifications between processes. A small, always-on plumbing service.

entries.title: Login session
entries.description: Manages your logged-in session — the login screen, fast user switching, and a clean logout/shutdown.

entries.title: Dock
entries.description: Draws the Dock and Mission Control / Launchpad. Also manages app launching from the Dock.

entries.title: Finder
entries.description: The macOS file manager and desktop. Always running; it draws your desktop icons and windows.

entries.title: Control Center
entries.description: Draws Control Center and its menu-bar items (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, sound, etc.).

entries.title: Time Machine
entries.description: Runs Time Machine backups. Uses noticeable CPU/disk/network during a backup, then goes quiet.

entries.title: iCloud Drive sync
entries.description: Syncs iCloud Drive and Desktop/Documents. Can be busy while uploading or downloading files to iCloud.

entries.title: iCloud daemon
entries.description: Coordinates iCloud services (CloudKit) for apps that store data in iCloud.

entries.title: Background downloads
entries.description: Handles background network transfers for the system and apps (downloads, uploads, updates). Network activity here is usually some app syncing.

entries.title: Certificate trust
entries.description: Checks the validity of security certificates for secure (HTTPS) connections. Briefly active when apps make secure connections.

entries.title: Gatekeeper
entries.description: Verifies that apps are signed and notarized before they run (Gatekeeper). Active when you open a new app.

entries.title: Security daemon
entries.description: Manages keychains, cryptographic keys, and security authorizations for the whole system.

entries.title: Directory services
entries.description: Resolves user accounts, groups, and login records — locally and against any corporate directory the Mac is bound to.

entries.title: Power management
entries.description: Manages sleep, wake, and power assertions. Decides when the Mac may sleep.

entries.title: Bluetooth daemon
entries.description: Manages Bluetooth devices — keyboard, mouse, AirPods, and more.

entries.title: Sharing / Continuity
entries.description: Powers AirDrop, Handoff, Universal Clipboard, and file/screen sharing.

entries.title: iMessage / FaceTime identity
entries.description: Manages your Apple ID identity for iMessage, FaceTime, and Continuity features.

entries.title: Apple Push Notifications
entries.description: Maintains the connection that delivers push notifications to the Mac. Keeps a persistent network connection — that's normal.

entries.title: Photos analysis
entries.description: Analyses your photo library for faces, scenes, and Memories. Runs when the Mac is idle and can use heavy CPU/GPU for a while after big library changes.

entries.title: Spotlight suggestions
entries.description: Powers smarter, on-device Spotlight ranking and suggestions.

entries.title: Web page (WebKit)
entries.description: A sandboxed process rendering one website in Safari or another app that embeds web content. One per page/tab is normal; a heavy site means a heavy tab.

entries.title: WebKit GPU process
entries.description: Renders graphics for Safari/WebKit on the GPU, isolated from web pages for security.

entries.title: WebKit networking
entries.description: Handles network requests for Safari/WebKit, isolated from web pages.

entries.title: Chrome helper process
entries.description: A sandboxed Chrome child process — a tab, extension, or the GPU/renderer. Chrome deliberately spawns many; high counts and per-helper CPU/RAM are normal.

entries.title: Google Chrome
entries.description: The Google Chrome web browser. Its actual work happens in many “Chrome helper” child processes.

entries.title: Safari
entries.description: Apple's web browser. Page rendering happens in separate WebKit “WebContent” processes.

entries.title: Mozilla Firefox
entries.description: The Firefox web browser. Tabs run in separate “plugin-container” / content processes.

entries.title: Slack
entries.description: The Slack messaging app. Built on web technology, so it runs several helper processes and can use significant RAM.

entries.title: Docker
entries.description: Docker Desktop and its Linux VM. The VM can use steady CPU/RAM while containers are running.

entries.title: Node.js
entries.description: A running Node.js (JavaScript) program — often a dev server, build tool, or an app's backend. CPU/RAM depends entirely on what it's running.

entries.title: Swift language server
entries.description: Provides code completion and diagnostics for Swift in editors. Spikes while indexing a project.

entries.title: Apple system process
entries.description: A built-in macOS component, usually a background service managed by the system. Most don't need any attention.

entries.title: Visual Studio Code
entries.description: The VS Code editor (or one of its helper processes). Built on web tech (Electron), so it runs several helpers and can use significant RAM with many extensions or large projects.

entries.title: iTerm2
entries.description: A terminal-emulator app. Each tab/pane runs your shell; heavy output or a busy command shows up here.

entries.title: iTerm2 session server
entries.description: Keeps iTerm2 terminal sessions alive across restarts so windows and running commands survive a relaunch.

entries.title: iTerm2 helper
entries.description: A small iTerm2 service that looks up details about the processes running in your terminal sessions.

entries.title: Xcode code intelligence
entries.description: Powers Swift code completion, syntax checking, and indexing in Xcode. Can use heavy CPU/RAM while indexing a large project.

entries.title: Swift macro plugin host
entries.description: Runs Swift macro and compiler plugins out-of-process during a build.

entries.title: Xcode device service
entries.description: Lets Xcode discover and communicate with connected iPhones, iPads, and other devices.

entries.title: iOS Simulator service
entries.description: Manages Xcode's iOS/watchOS/tvOS Simulators — creating, booting, and running simulated devices.

entries.title: Simulator app launcher
entries.description: Launches and hosts an app inside an Xcode Simulator.

entries.title: Simulator launch helper
entries.description: A helper that hands off app launches into the Xcode Simulator.

entries.title: Simulator disk images
entries.description: Manages the disk images that back Xcode's Simulator devices.

entries.title: Simulator audio
entries.description: Handles audio for apps running in the Xcode Simulator.

entries.title: Simulator media streaming
entries.description: Handles video/stream processing for the Xcode Simulator.

entries.title: Z shell
entries.description: The default macOS command-line shell. One runs for each open terminal tab; it's idle unless running a command.

entries.title: login
entries.description: Starts an authenticated terminal session (one per new terminal/shell login).

entries.title: sleep (command)
entries.description: The Unix `sleep` command, pausing for a set time. Usually launched by a script; uses no CPU while waiting.

entries.title: caffeinate
entries.description: Keeps the Mac (or its display) awake while it runs. Often started by apps or scripts that shouldn't be interrupted by sleep.

entries.title: SSH client
entries.description: An open secure-shell connection to a remote machine. Network activity here is your SSH session.

entries.title: SSH key agent
entries.description: Holds your unlocked SSH keys in memory so you don't retype passphrases. Idle background process.

entries.title: iOS device USB bridge
entries.description: Multiplexes USB connections to iPhones/iPads so Finder, Xcode, and Music can talk to them over a cable.

entries.title: Device pairing
entries.description: Pairs and maintains trusted connections with iPhones/iPads for development and Continuity features.

entries.title: XProtect malware scan
entries.description: Part of XProtect, macOS's built-in malware scanner. Briefly active when checking files or apps.

entries.title: WhatsApp
entries.description: The WhatsApp desktop messaging app. Built on web tech, so it uses several helpers and noticeable RAM.

entries.title: Nextcloud
entries.description: The Nextcloud desktop sync client. Busy on network/disk while syncing files to your Nextcloud server.

entries.title: Nextcloud Finder extension
entries.description: Adds Nextcloud's sync status badges and right-click menu to Finder.

entries.title: Chrome crash reporter
entries.description: Watches Chrome for crashes and collects diagnostic reports. Idle unless Chrome crashes.

entries.title: App updater (Squirrel)
entries.description: The Squirrel auto-updater used by Electron apps (e.g. VS Code) to install updates in the background.

entries.title: zNotch
entries.description: A third-party utility that makes use of the Mac's display-notch area (e.g. now-playing / quick info).

entries.title: OpenVPN Connect agent
entries.description: The privileged background service for OpenVPN Connect; sets up and maintains the VPN tunnel.

entries.title: OpenVPN Connect helper
entries.description: A helper for OpenVPN Connect that performs privileged network configuration for the VPN.

entries.title: Autodesk licensing
entries.description: Checks and manages licenses for installed Autodesk software. Idle background service.

entries.title: Autodesk access service
entries.description: Handles sign-in and updates for Autodesk applications.

entries.title: Autodesk error reporting
entries.description: Autodesk's Customer Error Reporting service; collects crash diagnostics for Autodesk apps.

entries.title: Mac Performance Monitor
entries.description: This app (and its privileged helper), which monitors performance and runs the diagnostics you're reading.

entries.title: RosettaCheck
entries.description: A utility that reports which apps are running under Rosetta translation rather than natively on Apple silicon.

entries.title: ScrobbleMate
entries.description: A utility that scrobbles the music you play to a service such as Last.fm.

entries.title: Quick Markdown
entries.description: A lightweight Markdown editor/previewer.

entries.title: Music/iTunes Artwork Agent
entries.description: Fetches and caches album and media artwork for the Music app and your media library; brief bursts of activity are normal when browsing or syncing music.

entries.title: Music Device Discovery
entries.description: Detects iPhones, iPods, and other devices for syncing with the Music app; it is most active when a device is plugged in or appears nearby.

entries.title: Music Library Agent
entries.description: Manages and keeps your Music app library and its database up to date; short bursts of activity are normal when your library changes.

entries.title: App Store Payment Sheet
entries.description: Displays the secure payment and purchase confirmation screens for the App Store and other Apple media services; it only runs when you are making a purchase.

entries.title: Neural Engine Compiler
entries.description: Prepares machine-learning models to run on the Apple Neural Engine (the chip's on-board AI accelerator); short bursts of high CPU are normal when an app first uses an ML feature.

entries.title: Neural Engine Storage Upkeep
entries.description: Cleans up and maintains the cached files used by the Apple Neural Engine; it runs occasionally in the background and should use few resources.

entries.title: Device Management Config
entries.description: Receives configuration and policy settings when your Mac is managed by an organization (MDM); activity is normal when settings are being applied.

entries.title: System Logging Helper
entries.description: A background helper that is part of macOS and handles system logging tasks; it normally uses very few resources.

entries.title: Audio Plug-in Crash Handler
entries.description: Watches over Audio Unit audio plug-ins and handles them safely if one crashes, so the host app stays running; activity is normal when using audio software.

entries.title: Audio Unit Plug-in Host
entries.description: Runs Audio Unit audio plug-ins in a separate, sandboxed process to protect the main app; CPU use rises with the audio plug-ins in use, which is normal.

entries.title: Device Management Accounts
entries.description: Applies account settings sent by an organization when your Mac is managed (MDM); activity is normal when those settings are updated.

entries.title: AirDrop File Sharing
entries.description: Handles sending and receiving files over AirDrop with nearby Apple devices; it is active only while you are using AirDrop.

entries.title: AirPlay Helper
entries.description: Supports streaming audio and video to and from AirPlay devices such as Apple TV; activity is normal during AirPlay use.

entries.title: App Prediction Helper
entries.description: Helps macOS predict which apps and actions you are likely to use next, powering Siri Suggestions and shortcuts; it runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Single Sign-On Service
entries.description: Manages single sign-on so you can log in to company or school accounts across apps without re-entering your password; activity is normal during sign-in.

entries.title: Credential Manager
entries.description: Securely stores and manages credentials such as passkeys and saved sign-in details; it runs in the background and normally uses few resources.

entries.title: Apple ID Settings Panel
entries.description: Provides the Apple ID section inside System Settings; it runs only while you are viewing or changing your Apple ID settings.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence Reporting
entries.description: Processes reporting and analytics data related to Apple Intelligence features; it runs occasionally in the background and should use few resources.

entries.title: Spell Checker
entries.description: Provides the system-wide spelling and grammar checking used by apps as you type; brief activity while typing is normal.

entries.title: Content Caching Server
entries.description: Caches Apple software updates and iCloud content on your network so other Apple devices download faster; heavy network and disk use is normal when Content Caching is enabled.

entries.title: Content Cache Locator
entries.description: Finds nearby content caching servers on your network so downloads can use them; it runs briefly and uses very few resources.

entries.title: Audio Plug-in Registry
entries.description: Keeps track of the Audio Unit plug-ins installed on your Mac so apps can find them; it normally runs briefly and uses few resources.

entries.title: Media Thumbnail Generator
entries.description: Creates preview thumbnails for audio and video files in Finder and other apps; short bursts of activity are normal when browsing media.

entries.title: Authentication Services Agent
entries.description: Handles passkeys, password autofill, and sign-in prompts for apps and websites; activity is normal when you are signing in or filling credentials.

entries.title: Bluetooth LE Server
entries.description: Manages Bluetooth Low Energy connections to accessories such as keyboards, mice, and trackers; activity is normal when Bluetooth devices are in use.

entries.title: Bluetooth LE Agent
entries.description: Works with the Bluetooth Low Energy server to handle connections to nearby Bluetooth accessories; activity is normal when Bluetooth is in use.

entries.title: On-Device Activity Agent
entries.description: Part of Apple's on-device system that records your device activity to power features like Siri Suggestions; it runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: On-Device Activity Ingestor
entries.description: Feeds device-activity events into Apple's on-device learning system that supports personalized suggestions; it runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: PDF Rendering Service
entries.description: Renders and processes PDF content for apps in a separate, sandboxed process; activity is normal when opening or previewing PDFs.

entries.title: Call/Message Filter Sync
entries.description: Keeps your call- and message-blocking and filtering settings in sync across your devices; it runs occasionally and uses few resources.

entries.title: Graphics Shader Compiler
entries.description: Compiles graphics shader code for the OpenGL system so apps can render visuals; brief bursts of CPU are normal when apps start using graphics.

entries.title: Calendar Siri/Shortcuts
entries.description: Lets Siri and Shortcuts work with your calendar, such as creating or checking events; it runs only when those features are used.

entries.title: Call History Helper
entries.description: Manages your call history records on the Mac, used by Phone and FaceTime features; it runs briefly and uses few resources.

entries.title: Call History Sync
entries.description: Keeps your call history in sync across your Apple devices via iCloud; it runs occasionally and uses few resources.

entries.title: Categories Service
entries.description: A background service that is part of macOS's Categories framework and helps classify content for the system; it normally uses few resources.

entries.title: Classroom Settings Panel
entries.description: Provides the settings for Apple's Classroom feature used in schools inside System Settings; it runs only while those settings are open.

entries.title: iCloud Keychain Proxy
entries.description: Helps securely sync your saved passwords and keychain items through iCloud Keychain; activity is normal when passwords are syncing.

entries.title: Cloud Telemetry Service
entries.description: Collects and sends diagnostic and usage telemetry to Apple's cloud services; it runs occasionally in the background and uses few resources.

entries.title: Cellular/Telephony Manager
entries.description: Manages cellular, phone, and SMS connectivity, including support for iPhone calls and texts relayed to your Mac; activity is normal during calls and texts.

entries.title: iCloud Drive Metadata
entries.description: Reads file details for iCloud Drive so items show correctly and stay organized; short bursts of activity are normal while files sync.

entries.title: Context Service
entries.description: Provides on-device context information that helps power suggestions and intelligent features; it runs quietly in the background and uses few resources.

entries.title: Context Store Agent
entries.description: Stores on-device usage context used by Siri Suggestions and other proactive features; it runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Continuity Camera Agent
entries.description: Supports using your iPhone as a webcam or scanner via Continuity Camera; it is active only when that feature is in use.

entries.title: Crash Reporter Helper
entries.description: Helps gather and manage crash reports when an app stops unexpectedly; it runs briefly after a crash and uses few resources.

entries.title: Safari Credential Helper
entries.description: Helps Safari fill in saved passwords and passkeys from credential providers; activity is normal when signing in to websites.

entries.title: Text Cursor/Input UI
entries.description: Draws text-input interface elements such as the cursor and related controls for apps; it runs briefly as part of normal text editing.

entries.title: Device Management Disks
entries.description: Applies disk-related settings sent by an organization when your Mac is managed (MDM); activity is normal when those settings are updated.

entries.title: Disk Unmount Watcher
entries.description: Part of Kerberos network authentication support, it watches for disks being ejected to clean up securely; it runs briefly and uses few resources.

entries.title: Dock Helper
entries.description: A helper for the macOS Dock that handles certain Dock-related tasks in a separate process; it normally uses few resources.

entries.title: Accessory Firmware Updater
entries.description: Updates the firmware on connected Apple accessories such as AirPods and certain peripherals; activity is normal while an accessory is updating.

entries.title: File Provider Helper
entries.description: Supports file-syncing providers like iCloud Drive and third-party cloud storage in Finder; short bursts of activity are normal while files sync.

entries.title: Family Sharing Settings
entries.description: Provides the Family Sharing settings panel inside System Settings; it runs only while those settings are open.

entries.title: Subscription Feature Access
entries.description: Checks which features your iCloud and Apple subscriptions unlock; it runs occasionally in the background and uses few resources.

entries.title: Find My Configuration
entries.description: Manages configuration for the Find My service that helps locate your devices; it runs occasionally and uses few resources.

entries.title: Follow Up Settings
entries.description: Provides the prompts and settings that remind you to finish setting up features like Apple ID or iCloud; it runs only when shown.

entries.title: On-Device Data Ingestor
entries.description: A background extension that feeds data into one of Apple's on-device learning systems; it normally runs quietly and uses few resources.

entries.title: Kerberos Credential Service
entries.description: Manages Kerberos network authentication credentials used to sign in to enterprise services; activity is normal during network sign-in.

entries.title: Game Controller Config
entries.description: Configures and manages connected game controllers; it is active mainly when a controller is connected or being set up.

entries.title: Game Mode Agent
entries.description: Manages Game Mode, which prioritizes system resources for games while one is running; activity is normal while playing games.

entries.title: General Settings Panel
entries.description: Provides the General section inside System Settings; it runs only while you are viewing or changing those settings.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence Safety Check
entries.description: Runs on-device safety checks on content for Apple Intelligence generative features; short bursts of CPU are normal when those features are used.

entries.title: Headphone Settings Panel
entries.description: Provides the settings for connected headphones, such as AirPods, inside System Settings; it runs only while those settings are open.

entries.title: Messages secure parser
entries.description: Safely processes incoming Messages content in an isolated 'BlastDoor' sandbox to block malicious data, and only runs briefly when messages arrive.

entries.title: iMessage secure parser
entries.description: Inspects incoming iMessage/FaceTime data inside an isolated 'BlastDoor' sandbox to protect against malicious content, and only runs briefly when data arrives.

entries.title: Intelligence telemetry ingestor
entries.description: A background helper that processes on-device intelligence telemetry data, and brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Intelligence transcript ingestor
entries.description: A background helper that processes on-device intelligence transcript data, and brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Messages database agent
entries.description: Saves and manages your Messages conversations in the local database, and brief activity when sending or receiving messages is normal.

entries.title: Messages media transcoder
entries.description: Converts photos, videos, and audio attachments into the right format for Messages, so short bursts of high CPU when sharing media are normal.

entries.title: Display calibration helper
entries.description: A low-level system service that supports the built-in display's framebuffer and backlight calibration, and background activity is normal.

entries.title: Bluetooth serial driver
entries.description: A system driver that handles Bluetooth serial-port connections to certain accessories, and background activity is normal.

entries.title: Image thumbnail generator
entries.description: Creates preview thumbnails of image files for the Finder and other apps, and brief activity when browsing images is normal.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence compute service
entries.description: Runs on-device computations for Apple Intelligence features, so temporary high CPU or memory use during those tasks is normal.

entries.title: Device management helper
entries.description: Applies older-style configuration profiles when your Mac is managed by an organization, and activity is normal mainly during enrollment or policy changes.

entries.title: Kernel event notifier
entries.description: Relays low-level system events such as low-disk-space or network filesystem warnings to apps, and background activity is normal.

entries.title: Audio Unit synthesizer plug-in
entries.description: A built-in Audio Unit instrument plug-in (an iPhone/iPad app brought to Mac) that generates sound, and it runs only when used by a music or audio app.

entries.title: Device management helper
entries.description: Applies older-style configuration profiles on Macs managed by an organization, and activity is normal mainly during enrollment or policy changes.

entries.title: Media Extension notifier
entries.description: A background helper that delivers notifications for system Media Extensions (third-party audio/video format plug-ins), and brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Metal asset upgrader
entries.description: Upgrades cached Metal graphics shaders and assets after system or app updates, so short bursts of activity after updates are normal.

entries.title: Metal shader compiler
entries.description: Compiles graphics shaders for the Metal framework so apps and games can render, and brief high CPU while compiling is normal.

entries.title: Speech synthesis voice plug-in
entries.description: An Audio Unit plug-in for the built-in MacinTalk text-to-speech voices, and it runs only when something is being spoken aloud.

entries.title: Managed asset download helper
entries.description: Helps download and manage background asset packs for managed apps, and brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Managed apps helper
entries.description: Installs and updates apps pushed by your organization on a managed Mac, and activity is normal mainly when managed apps change.

entries.title: Managed config files helper
entries.description: Applies configuration files sent to a managed Mac by your organization, and activity is normal mainly during policy changes.

entries.title: Managed preferences helper
entries.description: Applies preference settings pushed to a managed Mac by your organization, and activity is normal mainly during policy changes.

entries.title: Screen Time settings agent
entries.description: Enforces Screen Time and parental-control restrictions (the ManagedSettings framework), and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Managed settings helper
entries.description: Applies restriction and settings policies pushed to a managed Mac by your organization, and activity is normal mainly during policy changes.

entries.title: Device management test helper
entries.description: A diagnostic component of the device-management system used to test management commands, and it is normally idle.

entries.title: Audio Unit plug-in
entries.description: A built-in Audio Unit audio plug-in (an iPhone/iPad app brought to Mac) that runs only when used by an audio app.

entries.title: Messages assistant extension
entries.description: An extension that powers assistant and intelligence features inside the Messages app, and it runs only while Messages is in use.

entries.title: Messages action extension
entries.description: Provides extra actions and app integrations inside the Messages app, and it runs only while Messages is in use.

entries.title: Messages secure parser
entries.description: Processes incoming Messages content inside an isolated 'BlastDoor' sandbox to block malicious data, and only runs briefly when messages arrive.

entries.title: Device management migration helper
entries.description: Helps migrate device-management settings on a managed Mac, and activity is normal mainly during management changes.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence model manager
entries.description: Manages the catalog of on-device machine-learning models used by Apple Intelligence, and brief activity when models are downloaded or updated is normal.

entries.title: Press-and-hold input helper
entries.description: Shows the accented-character popup when you press and hold a key while typing, and it runs only during text entry.

entries.title: Installer package thumbnails
entries.description: Creates preview thumbnails for installer package (.pkg) files, and brief activity when browsing such files is normal.

entries.title: Managed passcode helper
entries.description: Applies passcode and password policies pushed to a managed Mac by your organization, and activity is normal mainly during policy changes.

entries.title: Performance and power telemetry
entries.description: Collects performance and battery/power usage data to help manage and report on system energy use, and background activity is normal.

entries.title: Power telemetry registration
entries.description: Registers apps that report power-usage data to the system's energy logging (PowerLog), and it is normally idle with brief activity.

entries.title: Network filesystem plug-in helper
entries.description: Loads plug-ins for network file sharing (NetFS, such as SMB and AFP connections), and brief activity when connecting to file servers is normal.

entries.title: Battery and power UI agent
entries.description: Manages battery and energy-related features such as low-power mode and battery notifications, and background activity is normal.

entries.title: iCloud key syncing
entries.description: Securely syncs the encryption keys that protect your iCloud data across your devices, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Quick Look preview helper
entries.description: Generates document previews and thumbnails for Quick Look in a separate process, and brief activity when previewing files is normal.

entries.title: Quick Look preview window
entries.description: Displays the Quick Look preview window when you press Space on a file, and it runs only while a preview is open.

entries.title: Remote management agent
entries.description: Coordinates device-management commands on a Mac managed by an organization, and activity is normal mainly during management updates.

entries.title: Crash reporter
entries.description: Creates a diagnostic report when an app crashes or hangs, and it runs only briefly after such an event.

entries.title: Memory diagnostics reporter
entries.description: Gathers system memory usage information for diagnostic reports, and it runs only occasionally for brief periods.

entries.title: Siri analytics orchestrator
entries.description: Coordinates background analytics extensions for Siri, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Safari bookmarks sync
entries.description: Keeps your Safari bookmarks and reading list in sync across your devices via iCloud, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Safari configuration helper
entries.description: Applies Safari configuration and policy settings, including those from a managed Mac, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Safari launch helper
entries.description: A small helper that supports launching and managing Safari, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Safari link extension
entries.description: Handles link-related actions for Safari, such as sharing or opening links, and it runs only when needed.

entries.title: File access bookmark agent
entries.description: Manages secure bookmarks that let apps keep access to files and folders you have granted permission to, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Managed screen sharing helper
entries.description: Applies screen-sharing and remote-access policies on a Mac managed by an organization, and activity is normal mainly during policy changes.

entries.title: Screen Time agent
entries.description: Tracks app and website usage and enforces Screen Time limits, and background activity is normal.

entries.title: Managed security helper
entries.description: Applies security policies pushed to a managed Mac by your organization, and activity is normal mainly during policy changes.

entries.title: Photos memories update service
entries.description: A background helper that updates curated photo collections and sets, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Share sheet interface
entries.description: Displays the system Share menu for sending content to apps and people, and it runs only when you share something.

entries.title: Shortcuts interface helper
entries.description: Displays Shortcuts app interface elements for editing and running shortcuts, and it runs only when shortcuts are in use.

entries.title: Sidecar (iPad display) relay
entries.description: Handles the connection that lets you use an iPad as a second Mac display with Sidecar, and it runs only when Sidecar is active.

entries.title: Siri audio plug-in
entries.description: An Audio Unit plug-in used by Siri for audio processing, and it runs only when Siri is active.

entries.title: Siri Notification Center service
entries.description: Supports Siri features shown in Notification Center, and it runs only when Siri is in use.

entries.title: Siri Suggestions maintenance
entries.description: Performs periodic cleanup and bookkeeping for Siri Suggestions data, and brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Managed software update helper
entries.description: Applies software-update policies on a Mac managed by an organization, and activity is normal mainly when updates are managed.

entries.title: Text-to-speech service

entries.title: iCloud Mail Agent
entries.description: Keeps your iCloud Mail account and settings in sync, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: iCloud Web Service
entries.description: Handles iCloud features that connect to Apple's web services, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Icon Services Agent
entries.description: Helps generate and cache the icons shown for apps and files, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Icon Services Service
entries.description: Builds and stores the icons shown for apps, files and documents, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Input Method Launch Agent
entries.description: Starts input methods used for typing in different languages, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Input Analytics Service
entries.description: Collects anonymous analytics about keyboard and input usage to improve typing features, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Install Coordination Service
entries.description: Coordinates software installations and updates so they run smoothly, and normally is active only during installs.

entries.title: App Installer Service
entries.description: Installs and updates apps and software packages, and may use more resources while an installation is in progress.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence Context Service
entries.description: Provides on-device context to Apple Intelligence features, and may use more resources briefly while processing requests.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence Platform Service
entries.description: Supports on-device intelligence features that power suggestions and personalization, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Apple Intelligence Tasks Service
entries.description: Schedules and runs on-device intelligence tasks for Apple Intelligence features, and may use more resources briefly while working.

entries.title: Intelligent Routing Service
entries.description: A background service that helps route requests intelligently between on-device intelligence features, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Intents Helper
entries.description: Supports app shortcuts and Siri intents so apps can offer quick actions, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Music & iTunes Cloud Service
entries.description: Keeps your Apple Music and iTunes library and purchases in sync with iCloud, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Jet Asset Service
entries.description: A background service that manages downloadable assets for an Apple system framework, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Kernel Extension Manager
entries.description: Manages system extensions and kernel extensions, and normally is active only when extensions are loaded or changed.

entries.title: Keybag Service
entries.description: Manages the encryption keys that protect your data, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Keyboard Services
entries.description: Supports keyboard features such as text replacement, autocorrect and predictions, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Keychain Sharing Service
entries.description: Securely syncs shared passwords and keychain items between your devices, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Knowledge Agent
entries.description: Syncs personal data such as bookmarks and history across your devices, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Knowledge Construction Service
entries.description: Builds an on-device knowledge index used by Apple Intelligence features, and may use more resources while indexing.

entries.title: Launch Services
entries.description: Keeps track of which apps open which files and handles opening documents, and is an essential part of macOS.

entries.title: Link Service
entries.description: A background service that is part of macOS and helps link related system data, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Liquid Detection Service
entries.description: Monitors hardware sensors for signs of liquid in ports and warns you if liquid is detected, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Live Activities Service
entries.description: Manages Live Activities that show ongoing information in the menu bar and notifications, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Language Switcher Service
entries.description: Helps apply changes when you switch the system language or region, and normally is active only when those settings change.

entries.title: On-Device Speech Recognition
entries.description: Performs speech-to-text recognition on your Mac for dictation and voice features, and may use more resources while you are speaking.

entries.title: Location Services
entries.description: Provides your location to apps and system features that you have allowed, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Lockout Agent
entries.description: Handles device-lock and account-lockout situations, such as when a device is reported lost, and normally is idle.

entries.title: System Log Service
entries.description: Collects and stores the system's diagnostic logs, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: System Log Helper
entries.description: Assists the system logging service with collecting diagnostic logs, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Login Service
entries.description: Manages user login sessions on your Mac, and is an essential part of macOS.

entries.title: Launch Services Daemon
entries.description: Maintains the database that maps file types to the apps that open them, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Content Key Service
entries.description: Handles secure decryption keys used for protected media content, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Network Discovery Helper
entries.description: Assists the network discovery service that finds shared devices and services on your network, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Mail Service
entries.description: Handles background email syncing and processing for the Mail app, and may use more resources while fetching large amounts of mail.

entries.title: Managed App Distribution Agent
entries.description: Helps install and manage apps deployed by your organization through device management, and normally is active only during installs.

entries.title: Managed App Distribution Service
entries.description: Distributes and updates apps deployed by your organization through device management, and may use more resources while installing apps.

entries.title: Managed Spotlight Service
entries.description: Indexes content from managed apps so it can appear in Spotlight search, and may use more resources while indexing.

entries.title: Maps Sync Service
entries.description: Keeps your Apple Maps favorites, collections and history in sync across devices, and normally runs quietly in the background.

entries.title: Setup Assistant Agent
entries.description: Supports the Setup Assistant used when setting up or migrating to your Mac, and is normally idle outside of setup.

entries.title: Spotlight Bulk Import
entries.description: Imports large batches of file information into the Spotlight search index, and may use more resources while indexing.

entries.title: Spotlight Index Sync
entries.description: Synchronizes Spotlight search index data, and may use more resources while indexing.

entries.title: Spotlight Metadata Writer
entries.description: Writes file metadata into the Spotlight search index, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Media Indexer
entries.description: Indexes your media so Siri and assistant features can find and reference it, and may use more resources while indexing.

entries.title: Media Analysis Service
entries.description: Analyzes your photos and videos on-device to recognize people, scenes and text, and may use significant resources while analyzing, especially after large imports.

entries.title: Media Analysis Access Service
entries.description: Provides apps with access to the results of on-device photo and video analysis, and normally uses very little in the way of resources.

entries.title: Media Remote Agent
entries.description: Handles media playback controls and Now Playing information so things like the keyboard play/pause keys and remote devices can control audio and video; brief activity when media plays is normal.

entries.title: Media Remote Daemon
entries.description: Coordinates remote media control and Now Playing status across the system and nearby devices; brief activity during media playback is normal.

entries.title: MetricKit Diagnostics
entries.description: Collects on-device performance and power metrics for apps and the system; it runs quietly in the background and occasional activity is normal.

entries.title: Media Intelligence Service
entries.description: A background service that supports Apple's on-device media analysis features; occasional activity is normal.

entries.title: Provisioning Profiles
entries.description: Manages mobile provisioning profiles that authorize certain apps and developer features to run; it is usually idle.

entries.title: Machine Learning Host
entries.description: Hosts on-device machine-learning tasks for system features; brief activity when those features run is normal.

entries.title: Media Maintenance
entries.description: A background service that performs periodic maintenance for system media libraries; occasional activity is normal.

entries.title: Device Activation
entries.description: Handles device activation and related identity checks with Apple's servers; it is normally active only briefly during setup or activation.

entries.title: System Asset Downloads
entries.description: Downloads and manages on-demand system assets such as dictionaries, fonts, and other supporting files; brief network and disk activity during downloads is normal.

entries.title: Clock, Timers and Alarms
entries.description: Manages timers, alarms, and world-clock features for the Clock app; it is usually idle and active only when a timer or alarm is set.

entries.title: ML Model Catalog
entries.description: Manages the catalog of on-device machine-learning models used by system intelligence features; brief activity when models are updated or loaded is normal.

entries.title: ML Model Manager
entries.description: Manages and serves on-device machine-learning models for system intelligence features; high CPU or memory can be normal while models are loading or running.

entries.title: Natural Language Processing
entries.description: Provides on-device natural-language processing such as language detection and text analysis for apps and system features; brief activity during text processing is normal.

entries.title: Noticeboard State
entries.description: A background service that is part of macOS's Noticeboard framework, which coordinates shared system state; occasional activity is normal.

entries.title: New Device Outreach
entries.description: Helps surface setup suggestions for newly detected nearby Apple devices and accessories; it is usually idle.

entries.title: VPN and Network Extensions
entries.description: Hosts VPN and network-extension plug-ins so that VPNs and content filters can run; activity is normal when a VPN or filter is in use.

entries.title: Nearby Devices
entries.description: Handles short-range wireless ranging and proximity features (such as locating nearby Apple devices); brief activity when nearby devices interact is normal.

entries.title: Network Extension Helper
entries.description: Supports network features such as VPNs, Wi-Fi assist, and content filters by handling configuration requests; brief activity as the network changes is normal.

entries.title: Network Session Manager
entries.description: Manages VPN and network-extension sessions, starting and stopping them as needed; activity is normal when such connections are active.

entries.title: NetBIOS Networking
entries.description: Provides NetBIOS name service used for older Windows-style file and printer sharing on the local network; it is usually idle unless such sharing is in use.

entries.title: Network Service Proxy
entries.description: Routes certain network traffic through Apple's privacy-protecting relay services; brief network activity is normal.

entries.title: Apple News Service
entries.description: A background service for the Apple News app that fetches and manages news content; brief network activity is normal when News is in use.

entries.title: NFC Service
entries.description: Manages Near Field Communication (NFC) features used for contactless tasks; it is usually idle on Macs that lack NFC hardware.

entries.title: Notification Server
entries.description: A core macOS service that delivers lightweight system notifications between programs; constant low-level activity is normal and it should not use much CPU.

entries.title: Rosetta Translation Service
entries.description: Manages Rosetta translation so Intel-based apps can run on Apple Silicon Macs; activity is normal while such apps are launching or running.

entries.title: Online Authentication Agent
entries.description: Handles online sign-in and authentication with Apple services; brief activity during sign-in is normal.

entries.title: Diagnostics and Analytics Helper
entries.description: Helps collect and process diagnostic and crash reports for macOS; it may briefly use CPU after an app crash or when reports are submitted.

entries.title: System Prediction Service
entries.description: Makes on-device predictions about system and user behavior to optimize performance and battery; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Siri Suggestions and Search
entries.description: Powers Spotlight Suggestions and Siri-related search results by communicating with Apple's servers; brief network activity during searches is normal.

entries.title: Wallet and Passes
entries.description: Manages Apple Wallet passes, cards, and tickets and related secure data; brief activity is normal when Wallet is used.

entries.title: Pasteboard Service
entries.description: Manages the clipboard (pasteboard) so copy and paste works between apps; it is usually idle and uses very little resources.

entries.title: Services Menu Manager
entries.description: Manages the system Services menu that lets apps offer shortcuts to each other; it is usually idle and uses very few resources.

entries.title: People and Contacts
entries.description: Supports system features that recognize and organize people from your contacts and photos; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Photos Library Service
entries.description: Manages the Photos library, including importing, organizing, and analyzing pictures; high CPU is normal while it analyzes or imports a large photo library.

entries.title: App Extensions Service
entries.description: Manages app extensions and plug-ins (PlugInKit), making sure they are valid and available to apps; brief activity when apps load extensions is normal.

entries.title: Contact Posters Sync
entries.description: Syncs Contact Posters (the photos and styles shown for your contacts) across the system; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Power Experience Service
entries.description: Manages power and battery-related behavior to balance performance and energy use; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: PPP Connection Service
entries.description: Handles Point-to-Point Protocol connections used by some VPNs and dial-up-style links; it is usually idle unless such a connection is active.

entries.title: Proactive Suggestions
entries.description: Powers proactive suggestions such as Siri Suggestions by learning patterns on your device; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Proactive Event Tracker
entries.description: Tracks on-device events to help power proactive features and suggestions; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Schoolwork Progress (ClassKit)
entries.description: Part of ClassKit, it syncs student progress for educational apps; it is usually idle unless education features are in use.

entries.title: Apple Advertising Service
entries.description: Handles Apple's privacy-preserving advertising features in apps like the App Store and News; brief activity is normal when those apps are used.

entries.title: IPsec VPN Key Exchange
entries.description: Negotiates security keys for IPsec VPN connections; it is usually idle unless an IPsec VPN is connecting or active.

entries.title: Continuity and Handoff
entries.description: Enables Continuity features such as Handoff, AirDrop, and Phone Call relay between your Apple devices; brief activity when those features are used is normal.

entries.title: Recents Service
entries.description: Tracks recently used items (such as recent contacts and calls) so apps can show them; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Reminders Service
entries.description: Manages and syncs your Reminders, including alerts and location-based reminders; brief activity when reminders change or sync is normal.

entries.title: Remote Device Service
entries.description: Handles communication with attached devices over the system's remote/restore interface; it is usually idle unless a device is connected.

entries.title: Remote Management Service
entries.description: Supports remote device management used by IT administrators (MDM); brief activity is normal, especially on managed Macs.

entries.title: Screen Recording Service
entries.description: Handles screen recording and broadcasting (ReplayKit); high CPU is normal while a screen recording is in progress.

entries.title: Data Replication Service
entries.description: A background service that is part of macOS's data replication framework, used to keep certain system data in sync; occasional activity is normal.

entries.title: Document Versions Service
entries.description: Manages document version history and revisions stored on disk so apps can revert to earlier versions; occasional disk activity is normal.

entries.title: Location Routines
entries.description: Learns your significant locations and daily routines on-device to power features like predictive suggestions and maps; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Real-Time Reporting Service
entries.description: A background service that reports diagnostic or telemetry data for certain system features; occasional activity is normal.

entries.title: Process and App Lifecycle
entries.description: Manages the lifecycle, priority, and resource limits of apps and processes; constant low-level activity is normal as apps start, stop, and move to the background.

entries.title: App Sandbox Service
entries.description: Supports the App Sandbox security feature that limits what apps can access; brief activity when sandboxed apps run is normal.

entries.title: Find My Service
entries.description: Powers the Find My network for locating Apple devices and items; brief background and network activity is normal.

entries.title: Find My User Agent
entries.description: Works with Find My to handle location and device-finding tasks for the signed-in user; brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Keychain Sync Service
entries.description: Manages the keychain and syncs passwords and secure items via iCloud Keychain; brief activity when credentials change or sync is normal.

entries.title: Security Initialization
entries.description: Sets up the security sandbox environment for apps as they launch; brief activity when apps start is normal.

entries.title: System Security Service
entries.description: Handles core system-level security operations such as cryptographic and trust services; brief activity is normal and it should stay low overall.

entries.title: Secure Enclave Utility
entries.description: Communicates with the Secure Enclave, the chip area that protects keys and biometric data; it is usually active only briefly during secure operations.

entries.title: Secure Element Service
entries.description: Manages the Secure Element used for secure payments and credentials (such as Apple Pay); it is usually idle unless a secure transaction is happening.

entries.title: Recent & Shared File Lists
entries.description: Keeps track of your recent files, favorites, and login items so they appear in menus and the Dock; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Shazam Music Recognition
entries.description: Provides the system's music-recognition feature (ShazamKit) that identifies songs playing around you; it runs only when that feature is used.

entries.title: Siri Shortcuts
entries.description: Runs and manages your Siri Shortcuts and voice-triggered actions; activity is normal when shortcuts run.

entries.title: Siri On-Device Learning
entries.description: Performs on-device analysis to make Siri suggestions smarter; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Siri Knowledge
entries.description: Maintains the on-device knowledge data Siri uses to answer questions and make suggestions; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Siri Text-to-Speech
entries.description: Generates Siri's spoken voice from text; it runs when Siri or system speech features talk to you.

entries.title: Service Management
entries.description: Manages apps' background helper services and login items installed via the Service Management framework; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Application Firewall
entries.description: Controls the built-in macOS application firewall that decides which apps may accept incoming network connections; activity is normal.

entries.title: Software Update
entries.description: Checks for, downloads, and installs macOS software updates; high resource use is normal while an update is downloading or installing.

entries.title: Hang & Stall Reporter
entries.description: Samples apps that become unresponsive to create diagnostic reports; it runs briefly when the system detects a hang or stall.

entries.title: Hang & Stall Reporter Agent
entries.description: Works with the system's hang reporter to capture diagnostics for your user session when an app stalls; it runs only briefly.

entries.title: Spotlight Knowledge
entries.description: Builds an on-device index of your activity to power Spotlight search and Siri suggestions; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Spotlight Knowledge Updater
entries.description: Updates the data files used by the Spotlight knowledge index; it runs briefly during maintenance.

entries.title: Stickers
entries.description: Manages your stickers (including Memoji and image stickers) used in Messages and other apps; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Disk & Storage Management
entries.description: Handles disk and volume operations such as formatting, partitioning, and mounting via Disk Utility; activity rises during disk tasks.

entries.title: App Store Purchases
entries.description: Handles in-app purchases and App Store transactions for apps; it runs when an app makes or checks a purchase.

entries.title: Classroom / Schoolwork
entries.description: Supports Apple's Classroom and education features for managed school devices; on most personal Macs it stays idle.

entries.title: Proactive Suggestions
entries.description: Analyzes your usage to provide Siri and system suggestions such as contacts, events, and content; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Software Update Helper
entries.description: Assists the macOS Software Update process with installation tasks; activity is normal while an update is being prepared or installed.

entries.title: Shared Web Credentials
entries.description: Manages associated-domains and shared web-credential links between apps and their websites (for example for password autofill); brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Software Transparency
entries.description: Verifies that Apple software comes from a trustworthy, publicly logged source as part of macOS security; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Network Symptoms Monitor
entries.description: Watches network connection quality to help apps choose the best available connection; ongoing low-level activity is normal.

entries.title: Network Symptoms Diagnostics
entries.description: Collects diagnostic information about network conditions for the symptoms monitor; it runs only briefly.

entries.title: iCloud Settings Sync
entries.description: Syncs certain app and system preferences across your devices through iCloud; brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: System Diagnostics Collector
entries.description: Gathers detailed system diagnostic logs, usually when you or a support technician trigger a diagnostic report; high resource use is normal while it collects data.

entries.title: System Extensions Manager
entries.description: Manages installing and approving system extensions such as network filters and drivers added by apps; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: System Logging
entries.description: Records system log messages from macOS and apps; ongoing low-level activity is normal.

entries.title: System Monitoring
entries.description: Provides system resource statistics (such as CPU and memory usage) that monitoring tools request; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: System Package Installer
entries.description: Installs Apple system packages and updates with elevated privileges; high resource use is normal while software is being installed.

entries.title: Migration Assistant
entries.description: Transfers your data, apps, and settings from another Mac or backup during setup; high resource use is normal while a migration is running.

entries.title: System Sound Server
entries.description: Plays system sound effects and alert tones; brief activity is normal whenever the Mac makes a sound.

entries.title: System Statistics
entries.description: Collects long-term statistics about power and process usage to help macOS manage performance and battery; ongoing low-level activity is normal.

entries.title: System Status
entries.description: Provides status information shown in the menu bar and Control Center, such as which apps are using sensitive resources; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Transparent App Lifecycle
entries.description: Helps restore your open apps and windows after a restart and manages app sleep/resume; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Code Signing Validation
entries.description: Checks app code signatures and entitlements when programs launch to enforce macOS security; brief activity is normal at app launch.

entries.title: Privacy Permissions
entries.description: Enforces privacy permissions and shows the prompts that let you allow or deny apps access to your camera, microphone, files, and more; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Text Composition (Writing Tools)
entries.description: Supports on-device text features such as Writing Tools that rewrite, summarize, or generate text; activity rises while those features are in use.

entries.title: Text Understanding
entries.description: Analyzes text on-device to power language features such as suggestions, summaries, and entity detection; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Thermal Monitor
entries.description: Watches the Mac's temperature and helps manage cooling and performance when it gets warm; ongoing low-level activity is normal.

entries.title: Date & Time
entries.description: Keeps the Mac's clock accurate by syncing with network time servers and managing time-zone changes; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Tips
entries.description: Supports the Tips app that suggests ways to use your Mac; brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Translation
entries.description: Provides the system's on-device translation feature used by the Translate app and other apps; activity rises while translating.

entries.title: Certificate Transparency
entries.description: Helps verify that website security certificates are publicly logged and trustworthy as part of macOS security; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Feature Experiments
entries.description: Manages Apple's on-device experiment framework that helps tune system features and suggestions; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Feature Experiments (System)
entries.description: Runs the system-level part of Apple's on-device experiment framework used to tune features; occasional background activity is normal.

entries.title: Certificate Trust Helper
entries.description: Helps maintain the data files used to verify security certificates and trust settings; it runs only briefly during maintenance.

entries.title: Time Zone
entries.description: Determines your time zone, including automatic time-zone changes based on location; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Accessory Firmware Updates
entries.description: Manages firmware update assets for Apple accessories and components; brief activity is normal, with more when an accessory updates.

entries.title: User Notification Center
entries.description: Handles certain system notification dialogs presented to you; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Accessibility Services
entries.description: Provides accessibility features such as VoiceOver, Zoom, and other assistive options; activity is normal when those features are in use.

entries.title: USB Audio Devices
entries.description: Handles audio from USB microphones, speakers, and interfaces; it runs when a USB audio device is connected and in use.

entries.title: Handoff & Continuity
entries.description: Tracks your current activity to enable Handoff and Continuity features across your Apple devices; brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: User Account Management
entries.description: Manages user accounts and switching between logged-in users; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Notification Center
entries.description: Delivers and manages the notifications and alerts shown in Notification Center; brief activity is normal when notifications arrive.

entries.title: User Notifications
entries.description: Supports the notifications that apps schedule and display to you; brief activity is normal when notifications are shown.

entries.title: Personal Voice
entries.description: Supports the Personal Voice accessibility feature that creates a synthesized copy of your voice; high resource use is normal while a voice is being created.

entries.title: System Watchdog
entries.description: Monitors the system for unresponsive components and helps recover from them; ongoing low-level activity is normal.

entries.title: Weather
entries.description: Fetches and updates weather data for the Weather app and widgets; brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Wi-Fi Analytics
entries.description: Collects diagnostic information about Wi-Fi performance to help improve connectivity; brief background activity is normal.

entries.title: Wi-Fi Peer-to-Peer
entries.description: Manages direct Wi-Fi connections between devices used by features like AirDrop and AirPlay; it runs when those features are active.

entries.title: Wi-Fi Performance
entries.description: Helps optimize Wi-Fi performance and roaming between access points; ongoing low-level activity is normal.

entries.title: XProtect Malware Protection
entries.description: Runs Apple's built-in XProtect malware detection that scans for and blocks known malicious software; brief activity is normal.

entries.title: Biome sync
entries.description: Syncs Biome data — Apple's on-device log of app and usage events that powers Siri Suggestions, Focus, and predictions. Quiet background service.
